name: Kokernag Botanical Garden
description: A sprawling, incredibly lush botanical garden featuring thousands of flowers, alpine trees, and a collection of freshwater springs that gush out from the base of a forested hill.
history: The springs spread out in a pattern resembling the claws of a rooster ('Koker' means rooster, 'Nag' means spring).
famousFor: Largest freshwater spring in Kashmir, trout fish hatchery, botanical gardens.
